title: テストでもっとステップアップ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Term exams—an ordeal every student at Tracen
must endure...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
This question has me thor'ghly stumped... What to
do?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I know, I know! You just need to put this
and this together...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that solved it! Wowzers, you're really
someth'n!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Now that we cracked all the questions, let's go
have some fun! C'mon!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: W-well, I'd like t'do some more study'n still...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
If I wanna become a cool city girl like City, I
gotta have both strong brains 'n' strong legs!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Yukino. You're really shining right now. It's
so cute! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I think it's awesome that you're striving to do
better.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Shucks! You're really butter'n me up...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
That's not true at all! Look, see all the likes we're
getting? My followers all agree!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I... I'm gonna work harder too!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I wanna sparkle even brighter! I'll get better
grades and be even more grown-up!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Sounds good! ♪ Hey, after we finish the test, how
about us three extra cuties go and hit the
town? ♪
